- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Home decor ecommerce web app with authentication, normal item listing, filters, and shopping cart flow.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Built a Next.js App Router TypeScript project manually in the current folder because the folder name could not be used as an npm package name by create-next-app.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Added a styled storefront home page, product catalog, product detail routes, browser-based auth flow, and persistent cart experience.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  No extensions were required by the project setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
  `npm install`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run build` all pass.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Added and launched a VS Code task for `npm run dev`.

- [ ] Launch the Project
  Dev server is already running. Debug-mode launch is pending user confirmation.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  README is present and updated. This file has been cleaned up and reflects the current project state.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
